start_of_tenancy.landlord_comments: Garden neat and tidy. Lawn could do with weed spray and fertiliser.
Some oil stains which could be jet cleaned
Black mulch laid which looks good
Gutter replaced last winter no further leaking reported
Numbering, clear and letterbox all good
Clear of leaves, no problems to report
Retic needs to be serviced this summer
Single downlights at entrance, tested and working
Issues with render on front pillar. Refer photo.
Roller door working and three remotes tested
4 down lights all working, dimmer working
A lovely inspection, no problems to report
Pantry sensor light, not working and pantry door, scraping on floor
A lovely inspection, no problems to report
The paint is peeling along the walls, this indicates damp from dryer, as it is not ventilated.
Security doors or working House alarm tested and working
